note: Synthetic trend objects created for Module 2 batch testing. Marked data_type=synthetic on each object. Structure matches module_1/outputs/runs/ exactly.

trend_objects.label: Quiet Luxury Street Style
trend_objects.summary: A wave of XHS posts reject overt branding in favour of understated, high-quality dressing — anchored in neutral palettes, precise tailoring, and restrained accessories. Creators frame this as a philosophy of dressing, not a product category.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords and themes around '静奢风', '不露牌子', '高级感', and show consistent engagement patterns from design-literate fashion creators.

trend_objects.label: Architectural Silhouette Dressing
trend_objects.summary: Posts cluster around structured, architectural garment shapes — oversized coats with strong shoulders, boxy blazers, and sculptural knitwear — framed as wearable art. Creators emphasise the geometry of the garment over decoration.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords around '廓形', '结构感', '建筑感', and evidence.posts show consistent engagement from fashion editorial and design-adjacent creators.

trend_objects.label: Triomphe Hardware Investment
trend_objects.summary: Celine's Triomphe hardware — the double-C gold clasp — is driving dedicated content around its investment value, styling versatility, and brand signifier status among design-literate audiences who reject conventional logo display.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords around 'Triomphe', '金扣', 'Celine投资', and all evidence.posts are Celine-brand specific with strong saves indicating purchase-intent engagement.

trend_objects.label: Monochromatic Precision Dressing
trend_objects.summary: Creators are styling head-to-toe monochromatic looks — particularly camel, cream, and black — as a precision exercise in proportion and texture contrast rather than colour-blocking. The trend foregrounds garment quality over novelty.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords '单色', '全身同色', '质感层次', and evidence.posts consistently feature neutral palette content from minimalist fashion creators.

trend_objects.label: Slim Bootcut Trouser Revival
trend_objects.summary: The slim bootcut silhouette is returning as a counter to wide-leg dominance, positioned by creators as a more precise, flattering alternative that reads more European than its predecessors. Celine's tailored iterations are frequently cited.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords '微喇裤', '靴型裤', '修身', and evidence.posts show consistent styling comparisons against wide-leg alternatives.

trend_objects.label: French Intellectual Editorial Aesthetic
trend_objects.summary: Creators draw on a French intellectual archetype — combining tailored separates, minimal accessories, and an effortless attitude — as a counter-programming to maximalist trends. Celine is the brand most frequently cited as the definitive reference.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords '法式', '知性', '巴黎女孩', and evidence.posts consistently reference Parisian styling codes and intellectual confidence.

trend_objects.label: Investment Leather Tote Culture
trend_objects.summary: XHS posts reframe the luxury leather tote as a rational long-term investment — analysing cost-per-wear, material aging, and resale value. Celine's Cabas and vertical tote formats are the most frequently benchmarked pieces.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords '投资包', '皮具投资', 'Cabas', and evidence.posts show high save counts indicating purchase-intent research behaviour.

trend_objects.label: Cashmere Quiet Luxury Layering
trend_objects.summary: High-quality cashmere and merino layering is framed as the tactile expression of quiet luxury — with creators focusing on fabric weight, origin, and subtle colour difference across layers rather than visible branding or surface decoration.
trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords '羊绒', '叠穿', '质感', and evidence.posts consistently focus on material quality and understated layering techniques.

trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords '廓形西装', '权力穿搭', '大码西装', and evidence.posts show high engagement from professional women in creative and corporate sectors.

trend_objects.ai_reasoning: Grouped because posts share recurring keywords '丝绸连衣裙', '真丝', '极简连衣裙', and evidence.posts consistently foreground material quality and understated styling.

trend_objects.label: Parisian Academic Intellectual Style
